CNC Turning A technology through which the material block fixed on the CNC turning center or lathe rotates with high speed,while the cutting tool moves into the rotating axis to process the workpiece and get CNC turned parts with cylindrical features. sections.heading: CNC Machining Tolerances
sections.text: CNC Machining Tolerances The general tolerances of CNC machining parts can be achieved up to+/-0.005″ or +/- 0.127 mm in accordance with ISO 2768 when cutting metals, and for plastics, it is usually two times that. Below is a table of some specific tolerances and size limitations, but the final tolerance depends on material, technique and drawing. Max Part Size Milling: 2000 x 1500 x 200 mm; Turning: 990 mm (length), 431mm (diameter) Min Part Size 10 x 10 x 10mm Linear Dimension Metals & PEEK: +/- 0.01 mm; Other Plastics: +/- 0.05 mm; No Drawing:ISO 2768 Medium; Hole Diameters Metals & PEEK: +/- 0.008 mm; Other Plastics: +/- 0.05 mm; No Drawing:ISO 2768 Medium; Shaft Diameters Metals & PEEK...

sections.heading: CNC Machining Materials
sections.text: CNC Machining Materials Junying CNC services work with a large selection of metal, plastic, and other types of materials. Plastic POM (Delrin), ABS, HDPE, Nylon, PLA, PC, PEEK, PMMA (Acrylic), PP, PTFE, etc. Metal Aluminum, Steel, Stainless Steel, Brass, Copper, Titanium, etc. Composite Carbon fiber, PC glass, PA glass, etc.

sections.text: CNC Machining Finishes You can choose a wide selection of metal surface finishing services after machining at Junying CNC machining manufacturer to improve the appearance, surface smoothness, corrosion resistance and other performance of your CNC machined parts. Two surface finishes can be applied on the same part. sections.heading: The Process of Your Order
sections.text: The Process of Your Order Get a quote Upload your design file through our online quote system. Order Placement Once the specification and price are confirmed, place your order with delivery details. Product Manufacturing Select the most appropriate production technique and material, then begins quickly. Quality Inspection Check if the quality and function of all parts reach the requirement. Shipping & Delivery After properly packaged, arrange the shipping according to the order.

sections.heading: Applications of Junying CNC Machining Services
sections.text: Want to get an online CNC machining quote instantly? Get Your Quote CNC Machining FAQs 1. What is CNC Machining? CNC (Computer Numerical Control) Machining is a subtractive manufacturing method, which adopts computerized devices to remove the extra materials from the blank and complete required tasks with CNC machine tools, to produce the final designed CNC machining parts. The machine tool, blade material, speed and feed, blade angle, cutting parameters, coolant, workpiece material, and more factors will affect the quality of the CNC machining service. 2. How does CNC Machining work? The CNC machining process generates the final part through the subtraction of material. CNC machines are ru...
